narrative:
Jefferson / Nellie / New Castle / Warsaw (precinct in Coshocton County) has 1,238 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.3 percentage points.
